hero.title: Fengming Liu
hero.subtitle: BSc Philosophy, Politics and Economics
hero.institution: University College London · Department of Political Science
hero.bio: I am a final-year PPE student at University College London. My research focuses on AI-augmented qualitative research methods, computational text analysis, political economy of technology, and consumer behavior in digitally mediated markets. I currently work as a research assistant at UCL, BI Norwegian Business School & HEC Paris, and Anhui University.
hero.mimitalk_desc: An innovative dual-agent AI platform for conducting qualitative research interviews. Co-developed as part of the Generative AI for Research Initiative.
